Notice Of Motion And Motion To Approve Settlement And For Entry Of Consent Judgment
Off Calendar Sep-25-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances (by Zoom):
William Verrick, Esq. 707-630-5061 Klamath Environmental Law Center for Plaintiff.
Malcolm Weiss, Esq. 213-532-2000 Hunton & Williams LLP for Defendant.

RULING - Mr. Verrick informs the Court the matter is not contested and states there was a typo on his proposed order. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF MATEEL ENVIRONMENTAL JUSTICE FOUNDATION'S Motion To Approve Settlement And For Entry Of Consent Judgment.

Plaintiff's unopposed "motion to approve settlement and for entry of consent judgment" is granted.

Order and Judgment are signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/RBU)
